brief: A U.S. airstrike kills Indian sailors on a shadow fleet tanker, a man sets off explosives at an NYC federal building, and the UK's new prime minister names his cabinet. Ukraine's army chief faces dismissal, the Paramount-Warner Bros. merger is paused, and new research explores AI feedback in education and visualization tools.
news_summary: Deadly U.S. airstrike on a shadow fleet tanker in the Gulf of Oman kills three Indian sailors; a suspect detonates an explosive device outside an ICE office in New York City. UK PM Burnham appoints Healey as chancellor and Miliband as foreign secretary, while Ukraine's top general is expected to be sacked and a court freezes the Paramount-Warner Bros. merger.
papers_summary: Studies examine AI feedback in student writing across a semester, attention-guided saliency maps for interpreting visualization literacy in VLMs, and a framework for tracking debris in hypervelocity impact imaging. Other papers analyze the effects of ChatGPT revision on personal statements and developmental pathways of noun phrase complexity in L2 writing.

Ukraine's army chief faces dismissal, the Paramount-Warner Bros. merger is paused, and new research explores AI feedback in education and visualization tools.

UK PM Burnham appoints Healey as chancellor and Miliband as foreign secretary, while Ukraine's top general is expected to be sacked and a court freezes the Paramount-Warner Bros. merger.

Other papers analyze the effects of ChatGPT revision on personal statements and developmental pathways of noun phrase complexity in L2 writing.

zh.brief: 英國新首相貝安德就任，中英關係或迎新篇章；西班牙世界盃奪冠，賽制爭議持續；朝鮮人通過K-pop接觸外界。
zh.news_summary: 貝安德接任英國首相，其務實路線可能影響中英關係，同時西班牙在世界盃決賽加時擊敗阿根廷奪冠，賽制與VAR引發討論。
zh.papers_summary: 今日無中文論文，英文論文探討AI反饋在寫作中的應用及視覺化圖表設計。

todays_image.caption: The camouflage on the 5075 tanker conceals its identity, much like the shadow fleet tanker hidden in plain sight until the deadly airstrike exposed it.
todays_image.title: Port Side of 5075 Tanker, Showing Camouflage
